prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 51 名逐步上升至 2026 年第 49 名，近年排名稳中有升，体现学校综合实力持续增强；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 94（一般），短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平；历史投档异常方面，2023 年曾有考生因分数线波动被录取，但未出现持续负面信号；交通运输工程 A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程 A，与该校物理类招生专业中的交通运输类、土木工程等直接对应，王牌学科对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，这些专业在西南交大均有招生，可能推高整体报考热度；吉林省 2026 年高考总人数约 110868 人，按近年比例估算物理类约 79800 人，较 2025 年物理类 80421 人略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解；西南交通大学位于四川省，非本省高校；该校在吉林省招生占比约 1.5%–2.7%（2021–2025 年），属于外省招生中等水平，无明显地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 7648、2026 年小幅缩招（83→79 人）使竞争略有缓解、学校排名上升及热门工科专业持续高热吸引更多考生报考等因素，预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 7477 名，区间 6977–7977 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 6977–7977 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<7000 名）可重点冲刺一档的交通运输类（A+学科）和计算机类/电子信息类等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（>7800 名）建议以三档的土木工程（A 学科）等为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6482→18873→7485→10349→7648, with a significant gap in 2022 (18873), fluctuating between 7485 and 10349 from 2023 to 2025, and a baseline of about 7648 in 2025, showing a slight upward trend over the past three years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 81 in 2021, 86 in 2022, 85 in 2023, 80 in 2024, and 83 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 79, a slight reduction of 4 compared to 2025, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science main list gradually rose from 51st in 2021 to 49th in 2026, showing steady improvement and enhanced overall strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; its Douyin popularity ranking is 94th (average), with low to medium exposure on short video platforms; regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2023 some candidates were admitted due to score fluctuations, but no persistent negative signals appeared; Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country) and Civil Engineering is A, directly corresponding to majors like Transportation and Civil Engineering in the Physics Category, with top disciplines strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, and these are offered at Southwest Jiaotong University, potentially boosting overall application enthusiasm; the total number of Jilin Province Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 110,868, with an estimated Physics Category of about 79,800 based on recent proportions, slightly fewer than the 80,421 in 2025, easing competition slightly; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Sichuan Province, not a local university; its enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 1.5%–2.7% (2021–2025), a moderate level for an out-of-province university, with no significant regional preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7648, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (83→79) easing competition, the university's rising ranking, and the sustained high popularity of hot engineering majors attracting more applicants, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 7477, with a range of 6977–7977.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6977–7977, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<7000), you can focus on Tier 1 majors like Transportation (A+ discipline) and popular majors like Computer Science/Electronic Information; if your ranking is near the upper limit (>7800), it is advisable to choose Tier 3 majors like Civil Engineering (A discipline) as a stable option.
